overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a red Gryffindor jacket walking along a snow-covered railway viaduct. The scene transitions from an enclosed path between stone walls to a view revealing a large gothic castle in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered railway viaduct between steep cliff and stone parapet

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-covered railway tracks, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with snow patches rising vertically beside the track
snow-covered railway tracks with wooden sleepers running straight ahead
high stone wall running parallel to the track on the right side
snow-capped mountains visible in the far distance through the haze

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snow-covered railway viaduct enclosed by a steep stone cliff on the left and a high stone parapet wall on the right. The path stretches forward into the hazy winter distance with snow-capped mountains visible far ahead.

events.description: large gothic castle with multiple spires comes into view on the right side in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the tracks as the view opens to reveal the castle ahead

entered.detail: large historic castle with multiple towers and spires perched on a rocky outcrop

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, the view opens up to reveal a massive gothic castle with towering spires on the right side. The stone parapet wall recedes slightly to the mid-ground as the castle dominates the distant view, creating a dramatic reveal of the destination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy railway viaduct that transforms from a confined stone corridor into a sweeping vista of a gothic fortress. It begins with the character walking forward, flanked by a steep stone cliff on the left and a high parapet wall on the right, while snow-capped mountains loom in the hazy winter distance. As the character advances, the restrictive stone walls begin to recede into the mid-ground, allowing the horizon to expand. The scene then opens up to reveal a massive gothic castle with towering spires that dominate the right side of the frame. This gradual widening of the perspective culminates in a dramatic reveal of the destination as the castle looms large against the wintry sky.
